name: Grand Ghirardelli Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Butter or margarine, very soft
recipeInstructions:
DIRECTIONS: Heat oven to 350°F. Measure the 6 dry ingredients into a large mixing bowl. Mix on low for 1 minute to combine. Add remaining ingredients, all at once. Mix on medium for 1 minute, scraping down the bowl to blend the mixture; beat on high for 3 minutes. Spread into 2 parchment-lined or greased and lightly floured 9-inch by 1-1/2" round cake pans. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes; cool for 5 minutes. Remove layers and cool on racks.
When completely cool, frost with Chocolate Butter Cream Frosting.
Separate recipe
Source: Recipes from Ghirardelli Chocolate Company of San Francisco
From: Sallie Austin
